title: 7 Aerospace Stocks to Buy for the Future of Flight
text: The aerospace industry primarily surrounds companies involved in the manufacturing of aircraft components and vehicles that travel into and beyond the earth's atmosphere. Aerospace stocks range from private firms focused on commercial space travel to large defense firms that supply our military.
